_note: bot.py reads tunable params from this file. Operator-only edits — no autonomous writer touches it. Two engines: NEAR_CERTAIN v3 (entry 0.70-0.85, exit ladder 0.96/0.97/0.98) and Snipe. Both share bet_sizing.pct_of_bankroll — ONE knob. Snipe live state is single-flip via snipe_engine.live_mode below ('off'/'shadow'/'live').

trading_host._note: engine_registry.is_active_trading_host() compares socket.gethostname() to active_hostname. Only the named machine places live orders. To migrate: hostnamectl set-hostname <new> on new VPS, then update this value.

price_bands._note: NC v3 outer band. Aligned 2026-05-06 with nc_v3_scan.NC_V3_PRICE_MIN_OUTER/MAX_OUTER. Per-cell ALLOW_TABLE inside nc_v3_scan.py narrows further. ws_engine.py and nc_v3_resolution_report_v2.py read these keys — must match across both. engine_registry.py is the Strategy ABC + register/all_strategies plugin layer (restored 2026-05-10 per task #102); it does not consume price_bands.

capital_allocation._note: Max % of bankroll deployable per engine. Future engines (snipe, oracle) declared here.

wallets._note: Multi-wallet support. wallet_id = unique key. label = display name. platform = which exchange.

bet_sizing._note: UNIFIED 2026-05-07. ONE knob: pct_of_bankroll. _compute_bet() in bot.py and snipe_engine.py both read this same value. bet = pct × current_bankroll, with a Polymarket protocol-min skip when the computed bet falls below 5 × entry_price. Operator directive: lowest legal % is the binding constraint at the band ceiling (NEAR_CERTAIN_MAX × 5 / bankroll). At $400 bankroll, NEAR_CERTAIN_MAX=0.85 → floor pct = 0.011. Set 0.015 for safety margin.

snipe_engine._note: Snipe engine SINGLE-FLIP. live_mode is the only operator knob. Values: 'off' (paper, default) / 'shadow' (full LIVE wires fire, $0 risk — records to trades.jsonl with status=SHADOW_OPEN) / 'live' (real money, full CLOB POST + chain-delta verify). Unknown values default to 'off' for safety. Snipe also reads bet_sizing.pct_of_bankroll above — no separate snipe-only sizing.

strategy._note: NC v3 only. Entry 0.70-0.85 with per-cell ALLOW_TABLE narrowing, dynamic exit ladder targeting 0.96, hard stop at 0.60 absolute, 1h volatility filter, daily-drawdown circuit breaker. Operator directive 2026-05-06.

dupguard._note: MAX 2 NC positions per market enables 2-rung ladder (each rung uses full nc_pct bet). min_price_delta=0.04 prevents both rungs firing at same price. Opposing-side bets always blocked. enabled=False also disables opposite-side block (per audit fix).

clob_throttle._note: Polymarket CLOB enforces sequential nonces per wallet. 250ms between submissions avoids collisions. Batch endpoint /orders accepts up to 15 in one HTTP call. Responses matched by token_id (FIFO per token). batch_enabled=false pre-live (Anthropic max-reasoning C7 2026-05-06): live response shape unverified; fail-closed in clob_throttle._align_batch_responses could block ladder exits if Polymarket omits token_id per response. Re-enable after first 100 live trades confirm response shape.

nc_strategy._note: NEAR_CERTAIN v3 strategy params. Entry band per_cell ALLOW_TABLE. Knobs read at runtime by NC scanner + execute_sell + monitor.

exit_ladder._note: Dynamic price ladder for sell-early. Try aim_high (0.98) first, walk down quickly. Per-rung dwell = 10s so a position never sits >30s waiting for sell-side liquidity.

nc_strategy.hard_stop_note: Absolute price stop. Bot exits if curPrice drops below 0.60 from any entry, regardless of position-level pnl.

volatility_filter._note: Multi-AI Tier 5 audit 2026-04-25: PERCENTAGE of entry price (12%), not absolute cents. Falls back to absolute cents if use_percentage=false. min_observations=4 prevents startup-blindspot trade-on-no-data.

circuit_breakers._note: Reset daily at UTC midnight. daily_drawdown_pct measured against bankroll snapshot at 00:00 UTC.

nc_strategy._snipe_tolerance_note: Per-engine target-snipe tolerance ABOVE the cell's band_min target. Non-micros (sports etc.) use a tight 2c window because price drifts smoothly; crypto micros use 10c because price moves in jumps via order-book sweeps and a tighter window misses fires. Read by strategy_nc_v3.py:_get_tolerance(is_micro). Bounded [0.005, 0.20] in code.
nc_strategy._non_micro_bankroll_cap_note: Fraction of bankroll allowed to be deployed to non-micro NC v3 fires at any one time. Micros are EXEMPT (uncapped per operator directive). Read by strategy_nc_v3.py:gate_check.

_rpc_urls_note: Polygon RPC endpoints used for chain balance reads (USDC.e + pUSD on proxy). bot.py:_chain_collateral_split tries these in order, returns (None, None) if all fail (see G4 atomicity contract). Bot falls back to RPC_URLS_DEFAULT in code if this key is missing — operator override here lets you switch providers without a code edit. polygon-rpc.com is API-key-gated as of 2026-05; publicnode + drpc are free public endpoints.
